headline: Assessing TELUS (TSX:T) Valuation As Telecom Earnings Mix Shifts Toward Digital And Health Services
summary: Key business mix and where TELUS makes its money TELUS (TSX:T) now draws revenue from a mix of traditional telecom and newer digital services. This matters if you are trying to assess how dependent the company is on core connectivity. The TELUS Technology Solutions segment is the largest contributor, with CA$15,467m in revenue. It covers mobile and fixed connectivity, internet protocol services, television, hosting, cloud and security offerings. Beyond connectivity, TELUS Health generates...

headline: Ahead Of Its Mega-IPO, SpaceX Reminds Investors Disruption Is Coming
summary: The SpaceX initial public offering promises to be the capital markets event of the century, breaking records and creating a new trillion-dollar company for investors to add to their portfolios.  Elon Musk’s commercial space company has leveraged its low-cost reusable rockets to disrupt space launch, communications, and, eventually, AI computing.  SpaceX is among the bidders, along with  T-Mobile US Verizon AT&T  and others.
